---
name: HubSpot Analytics Dashboard
about: Configure revenue-focused CRM reporting
---

## Objective
Aggregate CRM data into reporting dashboard.

## Tracking metadata
- Milestone: `M09` or `M10`
- Label: exactly one `milestone:mXX`
- Label: exactly one `type:*`
- Label: exactly one `priority:*`

## Metrics
- Leads by source
- Conversion rate
- Deal pipeline value
- Revenue attribution by domain

## Deliverables
- Dashboard configuration
- KPI definitions
- Weekly reporting cadence

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Dashboard includes source, conversion, pipeline value, and revenue panels
- [ ] Attribution available by `website_domain` and `lead_type`
- [ ] Weekly review process documented
